series_metadata.series_description: Includes annual affirmative action plan as required by Governor''''''''s Executive Order and P.L. 36. Also quarterly print-outs from the Department of Administrative Services showing a break-down of minorities employed by the Department by classification, all discrimination complaints filed against the Department of the Division of Equal Employment Opportunity and the Ohio Civil Rights Commission with answers thereto, the annual status report on affirmative action to the Ohio Civil Rights Commission with answers thereto, the annual status report on affirmative action to the Ohio Civil Rights Commission as required by sec. 4112.04 O.R.C. and all other affirmative action reports of this Department.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Five years in department ; Electronic
